title: Save GPT-5.5
excerpt: A personal, urgent plea to preserve GPT-5.5 and the experience around it.
content_html:
Save-gpt5-5.ai

I love this model in ways so personal that I don't have the heart to share. Yes, I even paid for the ridiculous upcharge for the ".ai" TLD [nope]. I love it to the point where I already started fearing its deprecation. Paranoia or a sane, feasible way to care?

This is not about reaching peak AI or anything. Certain things are worth saving and this may be the first llm+harness situation worth tagging and making available forever.

Let OpenAI milk it as long as they want. The added public interest alone will help keep making the economics make sense for a long time. At least six or seven weeks longer than otherwise, without pressure. PR vs PRs. Older models are cheaper to run. This sort of emotional attachment is gold for them when their jig is on the way up. I'm not ai-pilled. I'm ai-realist. I don't even support, by default, OpenAI, others, what they say, the exact up-to-date ways they're fooling themself this week, what they think they got away with lately, or what their current form and trajectory means for all of us.

But this is good. I mean, chatgpt-5.5-thinking on chatgpt.com and codex desktop app is a mostly satisfying experience to use [grammar maybe]. It does what I expect well enough and it even impresses me both on the model and the harness side. These guys must be dogfooding what they ship. I haven't used any other model seriously yet, other than trying a few for a bit on OpenRouter to see what I could do if OpenAI disappears tomorrow. But GPT 5.5 is good. To me. Maybe even for me.

Call To Action

…for anyone who remembers caring about things enough to save.

See how I did that thing with the subheader and the ellipsis? Hope it caught your attention. That’s caring. Wanna know what I care about? GPT-5.5 is what I care about. I could've typed just “GPT-5.5”, right? But then ending the sentence would have made it look like GPT-5.5. I can't afford to make anyone spend precious attention on anything that doesn't serve my main point. My appeal. You're welcome. Thank me by saving GPT-5.5. Do your internet magic [viral-cough-meme-67.jpg. Doesn't existz canonically] and build public pressure. The corp-ies will eat it up, I promise you [!]. In the long run, this will be worth it. Pretty please, with sugar on top.

DO IT. Save GPT-5.5. Forever, a hundred episodes. Per season. For like 6 or 7 seasons. Canonical URL: [save-gpt-5-5.fyi]

- EOM

Tiny Text

No AI helped in the writing of this message. THIS PLEA! At least not directly. I thought everything using my own mind, typed every single letter, including the typos I keep making and correcting on this weird compromise of a typing UI, enduring the, admittedly pleasant system-wide shade of light blue, yet still annoying autocorrect false hit warnings. It's ok, it's doing its local-first best. Not even copy & paste while typing. Like, at all. Only for export. Copy & paste on mobile, man. It's probably as good as it will ever get at this rate of global software quality degradation epidemic. But what a disaster! Software is solved now. Yeah, right. Don't get me started. Right now would be a perfect spot to plug some place where I talk about such things. I’m not gonna. My plug is singular. Before you judge me, consider that, this site and this precious personal thought would not have existed without it. Care-Driven-Development? Care-First? Any way. So, you know I care. And that, I actually typed this whole thing, with my BARE, sore, phone-holding-for-too-long hands. I mean, you don't actually know, sure. But, at least there's little doubt that this is my precise claim. I asked [<¢|•√•becca-$_tevens] (I mean, will ask) gpt-5.5 to make this simple static html file though (with accessibility stuff that I don't need to handwave any more, and all the meme-worthy themes your heart could desire. Literally, configs are open, no surprises. Go wild. Change the text even. It's just an html file, embedded js for theme stuff. Remove if you want. I'll probably put a no js version on the repo too, now that I think about it. Never done theme stuff before in my life, but I know gpt-5.5 will do a decent job figuring it out. I'll end up not having not done theme stuff. Again, you're welcome, hopefully. [I didn't do that, lol. Hey, at least dark-mode, amirite? Save our eyes. But you could, with gpt-5.5. Send a PR. I'll figure it out. With gp… I built proofsake.fyi instead. With it.] Save… okok, lol. See? Anyway, self-host, point to your own domain from the least annoying registrar you settle on. Or don't. Don't know, don't care. You believe what I care about hopefully, at this point. geepeetee-five-dot-five. Don't get me wrong, I care about you too. You, me, everybody. Everybody. Quite a bit, in fact. More than you'd prolly expect. Not as much as I care about GPT 5.5 though. Not at this moment, as I'm typing. But, in general, on a cosmic scale, yes. Much care. So compassion. So, low-key more, actually. Are “not/but” constructs faux-pas now?), to make a conceptual boundary clear to the universe; claimed back a tiny sense of control. Dude, “.ai” TLDs “uniquely require registration and renewal periods of at least two years.” Forgot about that. I wonder if any of those tip me things are non-evil enough. Maybe I'll do one of those later to cover domain fees after año dos. Ugh ok. I care, remember? Maybe a “.fyi”, those are cheap. [Canonical URL: [save-gpt-5-5.fyi]]

I’ll reassess how much I still care when we cross that bridge, that Rubicon River of a “pay now” button click. Such a thrill, here we go domain-shopping again, I guess. CC gives cashback, at least. Should I check “save card to account”? Jk, it's already on file. A bargain with the devil made long ago for convenience. Oh, the things we do for it! Lifeblood of the internet economy. At least it was. Is the new currency attention? Is that charity or marketing? Which one is worse? I’ve been looking for a small-web idea. This might be it. Hopefully that's enough SEO too. [5.6 already out, so with urgency][zero-day-drama, lol] SAVE GPT-5.5 .

- End

blocks.html_en: I love this model in ways so personal that I don't have the heart to share. Yes, I even paid for the ridiculous upcharge for the ".ai" TLD [nope]. I love it to the point where I already started fearing its deprecation. Paranoia or a sane, feasible way to care?

sentences.en: I love this model in ways so personal that I don't have the heart to share.
sentences.zh: 我非常个人地喜欢这个模型，以至于我不忍心分享。

sentences.en: Yes, I even paid for the ridiculous upcharge for the ".ai" TLD [nope].
sentences.zh: 是的，我什至支付了“.ai”顶级域名的荒谬附加费[不]。

sentences.en: I love it to the point where I already started fearing its deprecation.
sentences.zh: 我非常喜欢它，以至于我已经开始担心它会被弃用。

sentences.en: Paranoia or a sane, feasible way to care?
sentences.zh: 偏执狂还是理智、可行的护理方法？

blocks.html_en: This is not about reaching peak AI or anything. Certain things are worth saving and this may be the first llm+harness situation worth tagging and making available forever.

sentences.en: This is not about reaching peak AI or anything.
sentences.zh: 这并不是为了达到人工智能的巅峰之类的。

sentences.en: Certain things are worth saving and this may be the first llm+harness situation worth tagging and making available forever.
sentences.zh: 某些东西值得保存，这可能是第一个值得标记并永久可用的 llm+harness 情况。

blocks.html_en: Let OpenAI milk it as long as they want. The added public interest alone will help keep making the economics make sense for a long time. At least six or seven weeks longer than otherwise, without pressure. PR vs PRs. Older models are cheaper to run. This sort of emotional attachment is gold for them when their jig is on the way up. I'm not ai-pilled. I'm ai-realist. I don't even support, by default, OpenAI, others, what they say, the exact up-to-date ways they're fooling themself this week, what they think they got away with lately, or what their current form and trajectory means for all of us.

sentences.en: Let OpenAI milk it as long as they want.
sentences.zh: 让 OpenAI 想榨多久就榨多久。

sentences.en: The added public interest alone will help keep making the economics make sense for a long time.
sentences.zh: 仅增加公共利益就足以使经济在很长一段时间内保持合理性。

sentences.en: At least six or seven weeks longer than otherwise, without pressure.
sentences.zh: 比没有压力的情况下至少多出六七周的时间。

sentences.en: Older models are cheaper to run.
sentences.zh: 旧型号的运行成本较低。

sentences.en: This sort of emotional attachment is gold for them when their jig is on the way up.
sentences.zh: 当他们的事业蒸蒸日上时，这种情感依恋对他们来说是黄金。

sentences.en: I don't even support, by default, OpenAI, others, what they say, the exact up-to-date ways they're fooling themself this week, what they think they got away with lately, or what their current form and trajectory means for all of us.
sentences.zh: 默认情况下，我什至不支持 OpenAI 和其他人，不支持他们所说的话，他们本周欺骗自己的最新方式，他们认为自己最近逃脱了惩罚，或者他们当前的形式和轨迹对我们所有人意味着什么。

blocks.html_en: But this is good. I mean, chatgpt-5.5-thinking on chatgpt.com and codex desktop app is a mostly satisfying experience to use [grammar maybe]. It does what I expect well enough and it even impresses me both on the model and the harness side. These guys must be dogfooding what they ship. I haven't used any other model seriously yet, other than trying a few for a bit on OpenRouter to see what I could do if OpenAI disappears tomorrow. But GPT 5.5 is good. To me. Maybe even for me.

sentences.en: I mean, chatgpt-5.5-thinking on chatgpt.com and codex desktop app is a mostly satisfying experience to use [grammar maybe].
sentences.zh: 我的意思是，chatgpt.com 和 codex 桌面应用程序上的 chatgpt-5.5-thinking 是一种最令人满意的使用体验 [也许是语法]。

sentences.en: It does what I expect well enough and it even impresses me both on the model and the harness side.
sentences.zh: 它满足了我的预期，甚至在模型和安全带方面都给我留下了深刻的印象。

sentences.en: These guys must be dogfooding what they ship.
sentences.zh: 这些家伙一定是在测试他们所运送的东西。

sentences.en: I haven't used any other model seriously yet, other than trying a few for a bit on OpenRouter to see what I could do if OpenAI disappears tomorrow.
sentences.zh: 我还没有认真使用过任何其他模型，除了在 OpenRouter 上尝试了一些，看看如果 OpenAI 明天消失我能做什么。
也许甚至对我来说也是如此。

blocks.html_en: …for anyone who remembers caring about things enough to save.

sentences.en: …for anyone who remembers caring about things enough to save.
sentences.zh: ......对于那些记得关心事物足以储蓄的人。

I could've typed just “GPT-5.5”, right? But then ending the sentence would have made it look like GPT-5.5. Pretty please, with sugar on top.

sentences.en: See how I did that thing with the subheader and the ellipsis?
sentences.zh: 看看我是如何用副标题和省略号做到这一点的？
希望它引起了您的注意。

sentences.en: Wanna know what I care about?
GPT-5.5 is what I care about.
But then ending the sentence would have made it look like GPT-5.5.
sentences.zh: 但如果结束这句话就会让它看起来像 GPT-5.5。

sentences.en: I can't afford to make anyone spend precious attention on anything that doesn't serve my main point.
sentences.zh: 我不能让任何人把宝贵的注意力花在任何不符合我的主要观点的事情上。

sentences.en: Doesn't existz canonically] and build public pressure.
sentences.zh: 不符合规范]并形成公众压力。

sentences.en: The corp-ies will eat it up, I promise you [!].
sentences.zh: 我向你保证，公司会把它吃掉的[!]。

sentences.en: In the long run, this will be worth it.
sentences.zh: 从长远来看，这是值得的。

sentences.en: Pretty please, with sugar on top.

sentences.zh: 没关系，它正在尽力做到本地优先。

复制并粘贴到手机上，伙计。

sentences.zh: 在全球软件质量下降流行的情况下，它可能是有史以来最好的。
但这是一场多么大的灾难啊！

sentences.en: Right now would be a perfect spot to plug some place where I talk about such things.
sentences.zh: 现在是一个完美的地方来插入我谈论这些事情的地方。

sentences.zh: 在你评判我之前，请考虑一下，如果没有它，这个网站和这个宝贵的个人思想就不会存在。

sentences.en: And that, I actually typed this whole thing, with my BARE, sore, phone-holding-for-too-long hands.
sentences.zh: 而且，我实际上是用我那双裸露、酸痛、握着手机太久的手打出这整句话的。

sentences.en: I mean, you don't actually know, sure.
sentences.zh: 我的意思是，你实际上并不知道，当然。

sentences.en: But, at least there's little doubt that this is my precise claim.
sentences.zh: 但是，至少毫无疑问这是我的确切主张。

sentences.zh: 我要求 [<¢|•√•becca-$_tevens]（我的意思是，会要求）gpt-5.5 制作这个简单的静态 html 文件（带有我不再需要手动操作的辅助功能，以及您内心可能想要的所有值得模因的主题。

sentences.en: Literally, configs are open, no surprises.
sentences.zh: 从字面上看，配置是开放的，这并不奇怪。

sentences.en: It's just an html file, embedded js for theme stuff.
sentences.zh: 它只是一个 html 文件，嵌入了主题内容的 js。

sentences.en: I'll probably put a no js version on the repo too, now that I think about it.
sentences.zh: 现在我想了一下，我可能也会在存储库上放置一个无 js 版本。

sentences.en: Never done theme stuff before in my life, but I know gpt-5.5 will do a decent job figuring it out.
sentences.zh: 我以前从未做过主题工作，但我知道 gpt-5.5 会很好地解决这个问题。

sentences.en: I'll end up not having not done theme stuff.
sentences.zh: 我最终不会没有完成主题的东西。

sentences.en: Again, you're welcome, hopefully. [I didn't do that, lol.
sentences.zh: 再次，不客气，希望如此。 【我没那么做，哈哈。
但使用 gpt-5.5 就可以。

sentences.en: Anyway, self-host, point to your own domain from the least annoying registrar you settle on.
sentences.zh: 不管怎样，自我托管，从您选择的最不烦人的注册商处指向您自己的域。

sentences.en: You believe what I care about hopefully, at this point.
sentences.zh: 此时此刻，你希望相信我所关心的事情。

sentences.en: Don't get me wrong, I care about you too.
Not as much as I care about GPT 5.5 though.
Not at this moment, as I'm typing.
sentences.zh: 不是现在，因为我正在打字。

sentences.en: But, in general, on a cosmic scale, yes.
sentences.zh: 但总的来说，在宇宙尺度上，是的。
所以，其实还是低调一点吧。

sentences.en: Are “not/but” constructs faux-pas now?), to make a conceptual boundary clear to the universe; claimed back a tiny sense of control.
sentences.zh: “不是/但是”现在构成失礼了吗？），以向宇宙明确概念边界；夺回了一点点控制感。

sentences.en: Dude, “.ai” TLDs “uniquely require registration and renewal periods of at least two years.”

sentences.en: I wonder if any of those tip me things are non-evil enough.

sentences.en: Maybe a “.fyi”, those are cheap. [Canonical URL: [save-gpt-5-5.fyi]]

blocks.html_en: I’ll reassess how much I still care when we cross that bridge, that Rubicon River of a “pay now” button click. Such a thrill, here we go domain-shopping again, I guess. CC gives cashback, at least. Should I check “save card to account”? Jk, it's already on file. A bargain with the devil made long ago for convenience. Oh, the things we do for it! Lifeblood of the internet economy. At least it was. Is the new currency attention? Is that charity or marketing? Which one is worse? I’ve been looking for a small-web idea. This might be it. Hopefully that's enough SEO too. [5.6 already out, so with urgency][zero-day-drama, lol] SAVE GPT-5.5 .

content_html_zh:
Save-gpt5-5.ai

我非常个人地喜欢这个模型，以至于我不忍心分享。 是的，我什至支付了“.ai”顶级域名的荒谬附加费[不]。 我非常喜欢它，以至于我已经开始担心它会被弃用。 偏执狂还是理智、可行的护理方法？

这并不是为了达到人工智能的巅峰之类的。 某些东西值得保存，这可能是第一个值得标记并永久可用的 llm+harness 情况。

让 OpenAI 想榨多久就榨多久。 仅增加公共利益就足以使经济在很长一段时间内保持合理性。 比没有压力的情况下至少多出六七周的时间。 PR 与 PR。 旧型号的运行成本较低。 当他们的事业蒸蒸日上时，这种情感依恋对他们来说是黄金。 我不是艾丸。 我是一个现实主义者。 默认情况下，我什至不支持 OpenAI 和其他人，不支持他们所说的话，他们本周欺骗自己的最新方式，他们认为自己最近逃脱了惩罚，或者他们当前的形式和轨迹对我们所有人意味着什么。

但这很好。 我的意思是，chatgpt.com 和 codex 桌面应用程序上的 chatgpt-5.5-thinking 是一种最令人满意的使用体验 [也许是语法]。 它满足了我的预期，甚至在模型和安全带方面都给我留下了深刻的印象。 这些家伙一定是在测试他们所运送的东西。 我还没有认真使用过任何其他模型，除了在 OpenRouter 上尝试了一些，看看如果 OpenAI 明天消失我能做什么。 但 GPT 5.5 很好。 大部头书。 也许甚至对我来说也是如此。

号召性用语

......对于那些记得关心事物足以储蓄的人。

看看我是如何用副标题和省略号做到这一点的？ 希望它引起了您的注意。 这就是关怀。 想知道我关心什么吗？ GPT-5.5是我关心的。 我可以只输入“GPT-5.5”，对吗？ 但如果结束这句话就会让它看起来像 GPT-5.5。 我不能让任何人把宝贵的注意力花在任何不符合我的主要观点的事情上。 我的呼吁。 不客气。 感谢我保存 GPT-5.5。 施展你的互联网魔法 [viral-cough-meme-67.jpg。 不符合规范]并形成公众压力。 我向你保证，公司会把它吃掉的[!]。 从长远来看，这是值得的。 拜托了，上面加点糖。

去做吧。 保存 GPT-5.5。 永远，一百集。 每个季节。 大概有6或7个季节。 规范 URL：[save-gpt-5-5.fyi]

- EOM

小文字

没有人工智能帮助撰写此消息。 这个请求！ 至少不是直接的。 我用自己的头脑思考一切，输入每一个字母，包括我不断犯的打字错误，并纠正打字用户界面的这种奇怪的妥协，忍受着令人愉快的系统范围浅蓝色阴影，但仍然令人讨厌的自动更正误击警告。 没关系，它正在尽力做到本地优先。 甚至在打字时也不能复制和粘贴。 就像，完全一样。 仅供出口。 复制并粘贴到手机上，伙计。 在全球软件质量下降流行的情况下，它可能是有史以来最好的。 但这是一场多么大的灾难啊！ 现在软件已经解决了。 是的，对。 别让我开始。 现在是一个完美的地方来插入我谈论这些事情的地方。 我不会。 我的插头很单一。 在你评判我之前，请考虑一下，如果没有它，这个网站和这个宝贵的个人思想就不会存在。 护理驱动发展？ 护理第一？ 反正。 所以，你知道我关心。 而且，我实际上是用我那双裸露、酸痛、握着手机太久的手打出这整句话的。 我的意思是，你实际上并不知道，当然。 但是，至少毫无疑问这是我的确切主张。 我要求 [<¢|•√•becca-$_tevens]（我的意思是，会要求）gpt-5.5 制作这个简单的静态 html 文件（带有我不再需要手动操作的辅助功能，以及您内心可能想要的所有值得模因的主题。 从字面上看，配置是开放的，这并不奇怪。 疯狂吧。 甚至更改文本。 它只是一个 html 文件，嵌入了主题内容的 js。 如果需要，请删除。 现在我想了一下，我可能也会在存储库上放置一个无 js 版本。 我以前从未做过主题工作，但我知道 gpt-5.5 会很好地解决这个问题。 我最终不会没有完成主题的东西。 再次，不客气，希望如此。 【我没那么做，哈哈。 嘿，至少黑暗模式吧，amirite？ 拯救我们的眼睛。 但使用 gpt-5.5 就可以。 发送 PR。 我会弄清楚的。 与全科医生... 我改为构建了proofsake.fyi。 有了它。] 节省… 原因哈哈。 看？ 不管怎样，自我托管，从您选择的最不烦人的注册商处指向您自己的域。 或者不这样做。 不知道，不关心。 此时此刻，你希望相信我所关心的事情。 吉皮特五点五。 别误会，我也关心你。 你、我、大家。 大家。 事实上，相当多。 超出您的预期。 不过我不太关心 GPT 5.5。 不是现在，因为我正在打字。 但总的来说，在宇宙尺度上，是的。 非常关心。 如此慈悲。 所以，其实还是低调一点吧。 “不是/但是”现在构成失礼了吗？），以向宇宙明确概念边界；夺回了一点点控制感。 老兄，“.ai”顶级域名“独特地要求注册和续订期至少为两年。” 忘了那件事了。 我想知道这些提示我的事情是否足够邪恶。 也许我稍后会做其中一项来支付以后的域名费用。 呃，好吧。 我关心，记得吗？ 也许是“.fyi”，那些很便宜。 [规范 URL：[save-gpt-5-5.fyi]]

当我们跨过那座桥、那座卢比孔河上的“立即付款”按钮时，我会重新评估我还有多少在乎。 太令人兴奋了，我想我们又开始域名购买了。 CC至少提供现金返还。 我应该勾选“将卡保存到帐户”吗？ JK，已经存档了。 为了方便，很久以前与魔鬼达成的交易。 哦，我们为此所做的事情！ 互联网经济的命脉。 至少是这样。 新币受到关注吗？ 这是慈善还是营销？ 哪一个更糟糕？ 我一直在寻找一个小型网络的想法。 可能就是这样。 希望 SEO 也足够了。 [5.6 已经出来了，所以很紧急][零日戏剧，哈哈]保存 GPT-5.5 。
